title: Agent entry — AmmoLang universal boundary
motto: Everything runs through AmmoLang — script, compiler, Python, Hostess 7, unknown. Presume · hang guard · freeze assist.

policy.never_bypass: Do not invoke scripts, compilers, or python directly — route via ammolang-run.sh. AML_BUILD=0 only for emergencies.
policy.newlatest: Run ./lib/ammolang-run.sh ensure_protection after adding scripts. All .sh in NewLatest get boundary shims.
